PreToolUse._comment: Matcher is hard-coded to mcp__atlassian__*. If your Jira MCP server is configured with a different name, update the matcher prefix or the validation gate will silently not fire.

hooks.command: bash -c 'STATE="docs/.pipeline-state.json"; if [ ! -f "$STATE" ]; then echo "BLOCK: No pipeline state file found. Run the validation phase first." >&2; exit 1; fi; if ! command -v python3 &>/dev/null; then echo "BLOCK: python3 not found. Required for pipeline state checks." >&2; exit 1; fi; STATUS=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get(\"validation\",{}).get(\"status\",\"NONE\"))" "$STATE" 2>&1) || { echo "BLOCK: Failed to parse pipeline state file. JSON may be corrupted." >&2; exit 1; }; if [ "$STATUS" != "PASS" ] && [ "$STATUS" != "PASS_WITH_WARNINGS" ]; then echo "BLOCK: Validation status is $STATUS (expected PASS or PASS_WITH_WARNINGS). Fix story issues and re-validate." >&2; exit 1; fi; AWAITING=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get(\"checkpoint\",{}).get(\"awaiting_human\",False))" "$STATE" 2>&1) || { echo "BLOCK: Failed to read checkpoint state." >&2; exit 1; }; if [ "$AWAITING" = "True" ]; then echo "BLOCK: Human checkpoint active. Approve the current checkpoint before creating Jira tickets." >&2; exit 1; fi; SAVED_HASH=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get(\"validation\",{}).get(\"stories_hash\",\"\"))" "$STATE" 2>&1) || { echo "BLOCK: Failed to read stories hash." >&2; exit 1; }; CURRENT_HASH=$(find docs/stories -name "EPIC-*-stories.md" -exec sha256sum {} \; 2>/dev/null | sort | sha256sum | cut -d" " -f1); if [ "$SAVED_HASH" != "$CURRENT_HASH" ]; then echo "BLOCK: Story files have been modified since validation. Re-run /run-pipeline phase:validate." >&2; exit 1; fi; echo "Validation gate passed (status verified, checkpoint clear, stories hash matched)."'

bash -c 'STATE="docs/.pipeline-state.json"; if [ ! -f "$STATE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if ! command -v python3 &>/dev/null; then echo "BLOCK: python3 not found. Required for checkpoint enforcement." >&2; exit 1; fi; AWAITING=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get(\"checkpoint\",{}).get(\"awaiting_human\",False))" "$STATE" 2>&1) || { echo "BLOCK: Failed to parse pipeline state file. Blocking agent dispatch as safety measure." >&2; exit 1; }; if [ "$AWAITING" = "True" ]; then echo "BLOCK: Human checkpoint active. Awaiting human approval before proceeding to next phase. Do NOT dispatch another agent until the user responds." >&2; exit 1; fi; exit 0'

bash -c 'if ! command -v python3 &>/dev/null; then exit 0; fi; FILE=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get(\"tool_input\",{}).get(\"file_path\",\"\") or \"\")" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$FILE" ]; then exit 0; fi; if [[ "$FILE" == */stories/*.md ]]; then STATE="docs/.pipeline-state.json"; if [ -f "$STATE" ]; then if python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); d.setdefault(\"validation\",{})[\"status\"]=\"STALE\"; json.dump(d,open(sys.argv[1],\"w\"),indent=2)" "$STATE" 2>/dev/null; then echo "WARNING: Story file modified — validation invalidated. Re-run /run-pipeline phase:validate before pushing to Jira."; else echo "ERROR: Failed to invalidate validation state. Manually check docs/.pipeline-state.json before creating Jira tickets." >&2; fi; fi; fi'
